customManagers.description: Bump the yoziru/tesla-ble git dependency pinned in idf_component.yml
Bump the ESP-IDF version used by the CI build action
Bump the esp-web-tools version pinned in the browser installer

packageRules.description: Remind to re-check yoziru/tesla-ble compatibility on every ESP-IDF update (does not block the update).
prBodyNotes: ⚠️ **Before merging — verify `yoziru/tesla-ble` compatibility.** ESP-IDF 6.0 ships mbedTLS 4 (PSA Crypto) and removed the legacy `<mbedtls/ecdh.h>` / PK headers that tesla-ble (<= v5.1.1) still uses, so 6.x builds fail. Check that the CI `build` job is green; if this is a 6.x update, confirm a tesla-ble release with PSA-Crypto support exists and bump it too (`main/idf_component.yml`). Also migrate `json` -> `espressif/cjson` for IDF 6. See #17.
